summary: Test suite covers core matrix generation logic and workflow structure adequately but has significant gaps. Missing: unit tests for CLI entry point (index.ts) error handling and exit codes; unit tests for helper functions (cartesian, matchesRule); edge cases like completely empty configs, includes overlapping with base combos, and feature flag boundary cases. Design weaknesses: fixture files (.json) referenced but not shown—their validity cannot be verified; hardcoded expected strings in run-act-tests.ts are brittle (if output format changes, tests fail on string literals not semantic assertions); single act invocation limits verification of independent test isolation. Strengths: clear TDD approach with RED PHASE markers; good organization into logical describe blocks; explicit TypeScript types; workflow structure validation; actionlint integration. Would catch regressions in core cartesian product logic but would miss CLI parsing bugs, JSON schema violations, and edge case behavior.
